# Dikshant Yadav — Works

Project case studies and portfolio works by Dikshant Yadav, a Frontend Developer based in Delhi, India.

## About

This site showcases selected works and case studies by Dikshant Yadav. Each project demonstrates expertise in frontend development, UI/UX design, and modern web technologies.

## Projects

- Luxury Watch Brand — E-commerce experience with React, GSAP, Three.js
- Bespoke Luxury Porsche — Custom car configurator with Next.js, Framer Motion, Tailwind
- Naggy's — Restaurant identity and web design with React, GSAP, Prismic
- PineGold IRA — Financial services platform with Next.js, Framer Motion, Sanity
- Lori's Academy — Piano academy website with React, Tailwind, Contentful
- Lightwaves — Creative agency portfolio with React, Three.js, GSAP

## Main Portfolio

https://www.dikshantyadav.in

## Blog

https://post.dikshantyadav.in
